kirundi.top_line_value_per_interval: Agaciro k'umurongo wo hejuru kuri buri ntera
kirundi.bottom_line_value_per_interval: Agaciro k'umurongo wo hasi kuri buri ntera
kirundi.n_1_top_unit_corresponds_to: Unit 1 y'umurongo wo hejuru ihuye na
kirundi.per_interval_and_the_bottom_line_incre: kuri buri ntera naho umurongo wo hasi wiyongera na
kirundi.enter_an_amount_greater_than_zero_for_: Andika ingano irenze zeru kuri amahitamwo yombi.
kirundi.both_options_have_the_same_cost_per_un: Amahitamwo yombi afite cost per unit imwe.
kirundi.option_a_has_the_lower_cost_per_unit: Option A ifite cost per unit iri hasi.
kirundi.option_b_has_the_lower_cost_per_unit: Option B ifite cost per unit iri hasi.
kirundi.adjust_the_values_so_both_unit_rates_s: Hindura uduciro kugira ngo unit rates zombi zigume mu learning-model range.
kirundi.rate_outside_model_range: Rate iri hanze ya model range
kirundi.a_fair_comparison_divides_each_cost_by: Kugereranya gutunganye kugabanya buri cost n'ingano yayo bwite. Imiterere ishobora no kubamo ubwiza, gutakaza, canke izindi nkeneye.
kirundi.this_example_is_above_the_1000_learnin: Iyi ngero irenze urugero rwa 1000% rwa learning model. Hindura igice canke ikintu cose.
kirundi.this_result_is_above_the_1_000_000_qua: Iki nyishu kirenze urugero rw'ingano rwa 1,000,000. Hindura uduciro tw'ingero.
kirundi.the_percent_is_not_defined_when_the_wh: Ku ijana ntivyasiguwe iyo ikintu cose ari zeru. Andika ikintu cose gifite agaciro gihimbaye kugira ngo wubake umukanda.
kirundi.the_whole_is_not_defined_when_the_perc: Ikintu cose ntigisiguwe iyo ku ijana ari zeru. Andika ku ijana gihimbaye kugira ngo wubake umukanda.
kirundi.ten_equal_sections_each_represent_10_o: Ibimenyetso icumi binganya, buri kimwe kigereranya 10% by'ikintu cose kimwe.
kirundi.each_outlined_section_is_exactly_10_of: Buri gice cyashushanyijwe umurongo ni 10% by'ikintu cose kimwe neza. Igice cyuzuye igice cyerekana fraction nyayo ya 10% iyo.
kirundi.enter_at_least_two_valid_coordinate_pa: Andika nibura amakuru abiri ya coordonnées yemewe, harimo imwe ifite agaciro ka x katari zeru.
kirundi.not_proportional_the_evidence_does_not: Ntivyuzura: ibimenyetso ntibigaragaza unit rate imwe ihoraho inyura kuri origine.
kirundi.use_the_same_number_of_x_and_y_values_: Koresha umubare umwe w'uduciro twa x na y. Iyi graphe ya quadrant ya mbere isaba umubare utari munsi ya zeru kuri buri murongo.
kirundi.fix_the_coordinate_list_before_making_: Kosora urutonde rwa coordonnées mbere yo gufata ingingo ku bihuye:
kirundi.table_and_unit_rate_evidence: Ibimenyetso biva mu mbonerahamwe na unit rate
kirundi.a_proportional_model_ray_is_extended_t: Imirasire y'urugero ruhuye yaraguwe inyura kuri origine.
kirundi.no_complete_set_of_points_is_available: Nta seti yuzuye y'utudomo iboneka yo gushushanya graphe.
kirundi.table_evidence_all_defined_y_x_values_: Ibimenyetso by'imbonerahamwe: uduciro twose twa y ÷ x twasobanuwe tungana na
kirundi.the_entered_points_include_0_0_and_fol: utudomo twashyizwemo turimo (0,0) kandi tukurikira imirasire y'urugero.
kirundi.the_model_ray_extends_the_constant_rel: imirasire y'urugero yaguwe isano rihoraho inyura kuri (0,0), nubwo origine itashyizwemo.
kirundi.check_for_changing_y_x_values_a_nonzer: Reba niba hari uduciro twa y ÷ x duhinduka, agaciro ka y katari zeru iyo x = 0, canke utudomo tutari ku murongo umwe ugororotse unyura kuri origine.
kirundi.move_between_representations_and_expla: Genda hagati y'ibigaragaza kandi usigure isano ryo kugwiza.
kirundi.best_for_fair_comparisons_because_ever: Vyiza cyane ku kugereranya gutunganye kubera ko buri mimerere yandikwa bundi bushya kuri unit imwe.
kirundi.a_ratio_measured_against_a_whole_of_10: Ratio yapimwe ugereranyije n'ikintu cose cya 100; koresha igice = ku ijana × ikintu cose.
kirundi.a_straight_line_through_the_origin_sho: Umurongo ugororotse unyura kuri origine ugaragaza multiplicateur imwe ihoraho kuva kuri x kugeza kuri y.
kirundi.estimate_first_preserve_units_and_ask_: Banza ugereranye, bika units, kandi ubaze niba ingano zombi zahindutse mu buryo bwo kugwiza.
